buttons.rateAria: Rate Ghiblify on the Chrome Web Store
buttons.dragModeAria: Enter drag mode (move widgets without holding Shift)
buttons.modeToggleAria: Switch between Edit Widgets and Drag Mode
buttons.deleteBackgroundAria: Remove the current background from the rotation
buttons.favoriteBackgroundAria: Add the current background to favorites
buttons.unfavoriteBackgroundAria: Remove the current background from favorites

edit.notesShowBorderAria: Show the cardborder around the note
edit.notesHideBorderAria: Hide the cardborder around the note

weatherIconStyleAria.animated: Icons animate — click to switch to still
weatherIconStyleAria.still: Icons are still — click to switch to animated

quicklinks.emptyMessage: No quick links yet. Add one above to get started.

bookmarks.heading: Bookmarks
bookmarks.callout: Bookmarks panel — hover the right edge to open
bookmarks.errorNoChrome: This page isn't running as a Chrome extension — chrome.* APIs are unavailable. Open the new tab inside the installed extension (URL should start with chrome-extension://).
bookmarks.errorNoBookmarks: chrome.bookmarks is missing. Either the bookmarks permission isn't active, or the extension isn't fully installed. Try: chrome://extensions → remove Ghiblify → Load unpacked → select dist/.
bookmarks.noResultsSub: Nothing matches "{{query}}". Try a shorter search?

weather.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Enable it in Chrome to see local weather.
weather.permissionUnavailable: Geolocation isn't available in this context.
weather.fetchError: Couldn't load weather. Try again later.

socials.modalIntro: I'd love to connect! Come say hi :)

report.modalIntro: Found a bug or have feedback? Please email me or contact me on my other socials.

modal.title: Background Settings
modal.restoreConfirm: Clear deleted and restore all images?
modal.restoreOneAria: Restore this image to the rotation
modal.favoritesAlwaysOn: Favorites are always included in the rotation

background.loadingError: No background found. Check console for errors.

callouts.shiftDrag: Widgets are now draggable — click and drag to move
callouts.focusMode: Press Esc to exit focus mode

welcome.title: Welcome to Ghiblify
welcome.body1: A Studio Ghibli–inspired new tab page. These images are generously provided for free for non-commercial use by Studio Ghibli. Please enjoy this labor of love, and consider supporting the studio by purchasing official merchandise or media.
welcome.body2: As this extension has been newly revamped, please bear with me as I fix bugs and add features in the near future. If you notice any issues, please report them to me. I'm very grateful for your support. Thank you!
welcome.body3: Click Next to take a quick tour of the new features.
welcome.hint: Use ← → or the dots to flip through this guide.

findGuide.title: You can come back to this guide anytime
findGuide.body1Pre: Hover the left edge of the screen — or press
findGuide.body1Post: — to open the sidebar. The Guide button at the top brings this tour right back. Look for the pulsing button there now.
findGuide.hint: The sidebar is open behind this dialog so you can see exactly where to find it later.

widgets.title: Pick your widgets
widgets.body1: Tap any icon to show or hide it on the page. Active widgets glow with the palette's accent color.
widgets.body2Pre: These same toggles live in the sidebar — hover the left edge of the screen or press

palette.title: Choose a palette
palette.body1: Click a swatch to retint the entire UI. Light palettes flip text and surfaces dark; the Frost palette gives every widget a glass treatment.
palette.hint: You can switch palettes anytime from the sidebar's Appearance section.

adjustTime.title: Customize widgets
adjustTime.body1: Every widget has its own controls. The Time widget above is now in edit mode — flip between 12 / 24-hour, and drag the slider to size the clock.
adjustTime.body2Pre: Three ways to edit any widget: click Edit Mode in the sidebar, hold
adjustTime.body2Post: + click the pencil that appears on hover, or right-click the widget and pick Edit widget.

drag.title: Move widgets around
drag.body1Post: and click-drag the Time widget above to reposition it. Widgets snap to grid lines (left edge, center, right edge) so they stay tidy.
drag.body2: Don't want to keep holding Shift? Toggle Drag Mode from Edit Mode's top bar (or right-click any widget → Drag widget) and every widget becomes draggable until you click Done.
drag.hint: The cursor turns into a grab hand when Shift is down — that's your cue. This works on every widget.

rightClick.title: Right-click for quick actions
rightClick.body1: Right-click any widget for a menu of quick actions — Edit widget, Drag widget, Hide widget, plus shortcuts specific to that widget (12/24-hour for Time, °C/°F for Weather, sections, fields, grid/list, and so on).
rightClick.body2: Submenus open as cascading panels for multi-select options (Weather sections, Info fields). Right-clicking the empty background area gives you Chrome's native menu (back, reload, save image, inspect).

appearance.title: Themes & appearance
appearance.body1: The Appearance section has many palettes to pick from. Pick one and the entire UI retints.
appearance.body2: The Widget background slider tints the inner surfaces (Todo rows, SearchBar input, QuickLinks tiles). High contrast forces everything to a readable minimum.

background.title: Curate the photos
background.body1: Heart the current photo to add it to your favorites — favorites stay in the rotation no matter what. Trash it to never see it again.
background.body2: Open Select Backgrounds to choose which films appear, or browse and heart any photo from any film.
background.hint: Heart and trash buttons for the current photo live in the sidebar — pulsing now.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.openBookmarks: Open or close the bookmarks panel
shortcuts.editWidget: Edit a single widget (hold Shift, click the pencil)
shortcuts.escape: Close the sidebar, popovers, edit mode, or this guide
shortcuts.enter: Confirm an edit, or exit edit mode
